Localization.Description: Starting a process with an emoji in the start command possibly to obfuscate the code and create a bind or reverse shell

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} used emoji in the process start command possibly to obfuscate the code on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} on host {event_src.host} used emoji in the process start command possibly to obfuscate the code and create a bind or reverse shell at {dst.ip}:{dst.port}
